mnemonics: V-SCRIPTS: Validating Scenarios Checks Requirements In Project Testing Stages
keyPoints: Requirements Validation ensures the documented requirements match the user's actual needs.
Modeling Scenarios (like use cases) describe how a user interacts with the system to achieve a goal.
Techniques include reviews, prototyping, and developing test cases from the models.
commonMistakes: Validating requirements only at the end of the process instead of continuously throughout.
Creating models/scenarios that are too vague or abstract, missing crucial user interaction details.
Confusing 'validation' (are we building the right product?) with 'verification' (are we building the product right?).
